name: Andy
subject: from day one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Your grassroots support has powered us the entire way, and it'll be the reason we beat Matt Bevin on Tuesday.
|
---

| | Peter,

I wanted to say thanks. Yesterday, when I asked for support in our final weekend before Election Day, an astounding _654 of you_ donated toward our $25,000 goal. Your grassroots support has powered this campaign from day one, and it'll be the reason we beat Matt Bevin on Tuesday.

**But we haven 't quite reached that $25,000 goal, so [now I have to ask you to donate one more time.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557989/ad6dc73/17b64b40/db702a7/1805115735/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzNiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-finishline?refcode=20191103.2nd__436__&amount=15") If just 213 people pitch in before midnight, we'll hit our target and stay on track to win this race.**

I'm running for governor to deliver real solutions for Kentucky on issues like health care, public education, and jobs -- and I'm going to end the bullying and name calling coming out of the current administration.

Our teachers have been attacked for too long, our police officers and firefighters have had enough with the pension cuts, and families are tired of worrying about whether they're going to be kicked off their health insurance.

**Kentuckians deserve better, and this Tuesday is our chance to demand it. Will you be one of the last 213 people we need to pitch in toward our $25,000 goal so we can get every last voter to the polls on Election Day?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE name: Membership@EdMarkey.com
subject: See inside for your status update:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello - This is shocking, and it's putting us on high alert.

**The RNC had a record-breaking fundraising quarter.**

The mountains of right-wing cash the RNC is raising will make its way into Senate races like Ed's to fund relentless attacks.

That's why we're boosting our fundraising into overdrive--we need 155 new members of Ed's campaign to pitch in before midnight. See below for your status update:
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**2019 Membership Status:** **PENDING**
**Suggested Amount:** $10

**[Donate $10 now to stand with Ed>>](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-2019-membership?refcode=EM-110319_1&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") ** Hitting this week's fundraising goal is essential for recruiting and training new campaign staff, organizing volunteers and field teams, and getting our message to voters.

name: Tom Steyer
subject: Bringing the country together in one year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend, One year from today, our country will go to the polls. It will not only be a referendum on the most corrupt administration in our country’s history, but a moment for us to commit to climate justice, to break the corporate stranglehold on our democracy, and to restore transparency to the highest levels of our government. I am running for president to build the grassroots momentum that can bring us together around these key beliefs. Between now and then, I’m on the road getting our message out to voters, and one of the best platforms to do that is on the debate stage. The Democratic National Committee recently raised the number of donors needed to make the December debate to 200,000. [_**That’s why I’m asking if you can give $1 to help us hit this goal early, secure a spot on stage in December, and get ready to win in 2020.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBp8P9ONZnN8l-2Ffw22HZRSC1mFfjCO0JskafmRGtoRfu5cH6hxQvS29lzVgnBnGhaBxvSjIFmjkSPXXYpacm5BOnHoWgMkW5k3y-2BDgWSTQm34y5tEELmNzDmxkgTA3se9-2Fss6ub0sAnafHVPYhGJoxJoPyWtwRaZ-2Bj5eZzPxBwiTv5sARvgu6O1O9Q4TXTwjBaXXGoKtO1ZnD0fQRN5xJfXgAS1it86ry6YcLlUFUvqAm_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFd7CutVo26fQAE92ivaSJe9Eg1hS9KeerfZSqBJ-2BQirE2h0EHqnUf1gqrALNuX08YnfQtET3Hq0mu-2Fai8ujtiC6BZkM8TDYpGLAJ1QMEHj78s3U3nKd9LWeBa5tiql-2BeWgcUu8mdKPmJmqgS13oCFsYS2z1fs3vHJ-2BeA2pwCb2q7SFbz711zpAI-2BtcocJjHgrasMAW32q6CdMZiFRBJEq4RO2PxSZHVIioo6PKSImTQUBsQHuNUWGBq-2FNuYx2rBnViqzULSTeP7OBbEF0sKfzdA0Jx-2BhEtaxh1OPsqdQrnR2HGkaRbQgRz-2FFzfOMAr-2Bw-2FmiXB0JuPYmrMXApe8uoyjVv0vy7eObdGPJu68EZDK1C1krcHv5216-2BqoCC4TUIYIs-3D) Here’s to a brighter future,

clean_body: | | | | Friend, One year from today, our country will go to the polls. It will not only be a referendum on the most corrupt administration in our country’s history, but a moment for us to commit to climate justice, to break the corporate stranglehold on our democracy, and to restore transparency to the highest levels of our government. I am running for president to build the grassroots momentum that can bring us together around these key beliefs. Between now and then, I’m on the road getting our message out to voters, and one of the best platforms to do that is on the debate stage. The Democratic National Committee recently raised the number of donors needed to make the December debate to 200,000. Here’s to a brighter future, Tom | | [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]() We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about this movement. If you'd like to learn more about volunteering for Tom's campaign, . If you'd like to stay up to date with Tom on the road, make sure to follow him on , , and . name: Cory Booker
subject: We're one year away from taking back our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, Today marks a very unique milestone. **We are now exactly one year away from Election Day in 2020.** A lot will happen over this next year. But one thing must be a priority: uniting every member of our party under a collective voice and starting the healing our country needs. **Regardless of who becomes the nominee, will you pledge to vote next November?** **[Sign my pledge if you plan on voting in the 2020 election next year.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/pledge-to-vote-in-2020?source=em_pet_20191103_CB_20191103-pet-CB-oneyearout-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** If we turn out to vote in record numbers, yes we'll defeat Donald Trump. But even more importantly, we'll begin the difficult process of healing our deeply divided country and restoring America's true promise. **November 3rd, 2020. Mark it down. That 's the day we finally end this national nightmare.** Sincerely,
Cory P.S. If you're not already registered, what are you waiting for? **[Please register here. It'll only take a few moments.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ace/5fca0d19/76562036/291c00f1/20454165/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://iwillvote.com")**
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ace/5fca0d19/76562036/291c00ff/20454165/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ace/5fca0d19/76562036/291c00fe/20454165/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ace/5fca0d19/76562036/291c00fd/20454165/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ace/5fca0d19/76562036/291c00fc/20454165/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: Bennet Outreach Team
subject: Michael needs to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Hi Team.

Michael's been a unique candidate in this race.

Instead of focusing on flashy media appearances or big stunts, he's been travelling the country, speaking with voters about the issues that matter most to them.

From town halls in Iowa talking about teacher pay and the national debt, to a small business forum in New Hampshire, this campaign isn't slowing down.

Our progress wouldn't have been possible without you, friend.

[We're preparing a list of top supporters to show to Michael, and it would really mean a lot to him and the team if you added your name.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae49/134673f2/a50a375/6997cd2b/3797180942/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/im-team-bennet?source=EM_PET_B2_110319_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Finally!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
**This weekend, Fox News invited me on to explain a better way forward** on ISIS, Syria, Iran, defense reform — as well as Medicare-for-All, and VA-like hospitals for rural communities. **I explained how** we must take a practical, pragmatic approach to these critical issues (link below).
**This is significant: after our “bump" in the New Hampshire poll, the first of the three cable news networks has finally opened their door to me!**
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11518740/117404577/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjBlY2QzYy0wN2ZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fYiUbrvacj9glYBAwq8d6PKDUieNYTydHfj6SXjgsNk=&refcode=em110419C1)
As one of the **networks wrote in an email to its producers just the day after my entry** into the Presidential race: “Joe Sestak (former Navy admiral and former U.S. House member from Pennsylvania)...has no significant financial resources...and more than 400 people have already filed paperwork with the FEC to run for President...our number remains 23 major democratic candidates.”
That motivated us to work twice as hard — attending over 325 events, driving the equivalent of 7 times across the nation, shaking over 35,000 hands — to finally get the national TV exposure that unfortunately these days provides necessary “validation” of one’s candidacy.
We made it because of you!
[**Please contribute again today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11518741/117404578/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjBlY2QzYy0wN2ZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fYiUbrvacj9glYBAwq8d6PKDUieNYTydHfj6SXjgsNk=&refcode=em110419P1) to not only keep our TV ads up and our ground operation running, but [**to get up next on MSNBC and CNN**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11518742/117404579/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjBlY2QzYy0wN2ZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fYiUbrvacj9glYBAwq8d6PKDUieNYTydHfj6SXjgsNk=&refcode=em110419P2)! clean_body: Peter, This weekend, Fox News invited me on to explain a better way forward on ISIS, Syria, Iran, defense reform — as well as Medicare-for-All, and VA-like hospitals for rural communities. I explained how we must take a practical, pragmatic approach to these critical issues (link below). This is significant: after our “bump" in the New Hampshire poll, the first of the three cable news networks has finally opened their door to me! As one of the networks wrote in an email to its producers just the day after my entry into the Presidential race: “Joe Sestak (former Navy admiral and former U.S. House member from Pennsylvania)...has no significant financial resources...and more than 400 people have already filed paperwork with the FEC to run for President...our number remains 23 major democratic candidates.” That motivated us to work twice as hard — attending over 325 events, driving the equivalent of 7 times across the nation, shaking over 35,000 hands — to finally get the national TV exposure that unfortunately these days provides necessary “validation” of one’s candidacy. We made it because of you! to not only keep our TV ads up and our ground operation running, but ! It really helps!! Warmest regards, Joe Come on board. We encourage you to and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times. Paid for by Joe Sestak for President Joe Sestak for President P.O Box 17246 Alexandria, VA 22302 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: Claire Chase for Congress
subject: ICYMI: Democrats aren’t impeaching because of Ukraine – they are impeaching because President Trump is governing exactly the way he promised.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friends,
I wanted to share with you my op-ed that ran in Sunday's Edition of the Hobbs News-Sun. I hope you'll take a moment to read it and share with you friends and colleagues.
Thank you \- Claire

Democrats aren't impeaching because of Ukraine - they are impeaching because President Trump is governing exactly the way he promised.
Make no mistake: the Democrats are not seeking to impeach President Trump because of Ukraine; they are moving to impeach him because he is governing exactly the way he promised - and that terrifies them.
President Trump was elected because for too long, the American people were sold a bill of goods from entrenched insider politicians who cast our nation's best interests aside to advance their own. Both sides have made empty promises geared toward securing their own re-election, not solving the problems of middle-class, hard-working Americans.
By 2016, the American people had seen enough. After years of empty promises, we bucked the establishment political class and elected President Trump to do the job that career politicians lacked the courage to do.
President Trump has been delivering on his promises, and from the moment he took office Democrats have been determined to impeach him for it.
In 2018, grassroots Republicans across the nation warned what would happen if the Democrats regained control of the House and elected Nancy Pelosi as Speaker. Once again, our national interests would be cast aside while Democrats focused on advancing their own - sabotaging the results of the 2016 election.
Unfortunately, by losing the 2nd District and not running a campaign worthy of defending President Trump and his bold agenda in 2018, Republicans hand delivered Nancy Pelosi another member of the Resistance and another vote for impeachment. This never should have happened.
President Trump has delivered results that generations of conservatives talked about, but could not bring to fruition.
On immigration, we finally have a President who is fighting for the values upon which our nation was built - national sovereignty and border security.
On trade, we finally have a President who is fighting back against China and standing up for the forgotten American workers in New Mexico who have been ignored by Democrats for decades.
On taxes, we finally have a President who knows your money is better spent by you, not the federal government or Washington elites.
On the economy, we finally have a President who has unleashed the single greatest economic engine since World War II, delivering historically low unemployment for women and Hispanics, while unleashing the true potential of our oil and gas industry.
On the Second Amendment, we finally have a President who is a staunch defender of our right to bear arms against totalitarian efforts by the Left to strip us of our freedoms. And on national security, news that U.S. special forces led an operation to kill notorious ISIS leader Abu al-Baghdadi is the latest example of how President Trump is showing the world that we will not stop until terrorists across the globe are brought to justice.
Plain and simple, we finally have a President who is keeping his promises to the American people - and the Democrats want to impeach him for it.
I chose to run for Congress because like so many of the hard-working men and women of the 2nd District, I am sick over the fact that we lost a seat to Nancy Pelosi and delivered another vote to impeach President Trump. If we want to send President Trump an ally who will stand up to Democrats in Washington, we won't do so by running the same failed candidates expecting different results - that is the definition of insanity.
To protect the conservative record and accomplishments secured by this President, it will take electing new fighters who can, and will, actually deliver for the American people. Washington already has enough politicians who cast our nation's best interests aside to advance their own.
The Democrats are not seeking to impeach our President because of Ukraine - they want to impeach him because they can't beat his ideas, his policy, or his record of results in 2020. And I am running for Congress to join the fight to make sure the Democrats don't beat him with impeachment either.
---
| [ClaireChase.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bvbnzl5pFnjBwxyEH8YAzPJcrp5YbKn1dNMuiANbf_yKqdYBShLo8HIX4hPbs8gShuzlP6Mt-gjcJpfusbcdtEzY3srX7xYBL-3jC8hcOwzs1ez_Dvw0_OTWsjP9FlaqFYbfLyt65rHhDIcgiMZ1zA==&c=q2f4xJ2dQW1LHt-2a0KSp3xM7TrwCuAuEvobpxcvibqlLO0z6extzA==&ch=RSjFE_goaDhg-3qNNXN1TgqOaoZ6C4UyECGDMf2lwAxPhyBsxDoN6A==)

The Democrats in 2020 are trying to return the favor- trying to win in Florida.

Let's be clear- there is NO Republican win in 2020 without Florida.

Plus, it's now President Trump's home state!

People here have no tolerance for the Dems' impeachment scam. They have no tolerance for the crazy policies and socialism.

We are red-blooded Americans! AOC and her extremism have no place here.

Me? I'm a working class guy who loves God and my country. I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies!

I'm going to defeat Darren Soto, a liberal extremist who thinks it's a good idea to hold secret meetings in the Capitol basement, out of public eye.

This isn't what the Constitution envisioned. This sad spectacle of partisan revenge is not what America is!

President Trump is innocent! We need to make sure the crazy Democrats pay dearly for what they are doing. And we do that at the ballot box!

I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, stop the radicals in Congress, stop impeachment and win Florida for the Republicans! Can you help me?

The Democrats are going to lose next year- but only if we let the American people know what they have done. It's up to us!

Let's get this done!

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

name: Jason Yates
subject: The big day is tomorrow! Please don’t forget to vote.
body:
| | Hi Peter, You have statewide elections in Virginia tomorrow! Are you ready to vote? This is your opportunity, as a Christian, to stand for the issues our faith compels us to care about:
* Religious Freedom
* Sanctity of Life
* Marriage and Family
* Care and Compassion for those in need

Voting is one way we have the opportunity to “do good” as Galatians 6:10 instructs. We can bring biblical values to fruition in our communities and states by simply showing up to cast our vote I hope you won’t miss this opportunity! We’re counting on you and millions of Christians across the country to bring our values to the polls tomorrow. Need to learn about what’s on your ballot before you vote? We’ve got you covered! Check out the [Voting Assistance Center](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18RDXQnLcn6XY3v7CgASEi0A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191104_db4_03&n=1) with all the voting information for your state, including a voter guide, party platforms, and your local polling place information. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18RDXQnLcn6XY3v7CgASEi0A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191104_db4_03&n=2) Would you do us a favor and forward this election reminder email to other Christians in your state? Together, let’s make sure every person of faith takes advantage of this unique responsibility to advance the issues we care about. **Pray. Think. Vote.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191104_db4_03&n=3)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191104_db4_03&n=4).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191104_db4_03&n=5) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191104_db4_03&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191104_db4_03&n=7)

name: Cory Booker
subject: This is a sad moment for our nation.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, As the House moves forward with an impeachment inquiry, I want to be clear about something. **This is not about politics. This is about patriotism, and this is a sad moment for our nation.** We need to move swiftly and continue to gather the facts. I'm proud of House Democrats for putting partisan politics aside and setting up a process that builds consensus by ensuring that the evidence is laid bare for the American people. Republicans have already been trying to impede the process, and the White House has refused to comply with subpoenas and records requests. [**Add your name if you agree that the impeachment process should proceed without any partisan interference.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/start-impeachment-proceedings?source=em_su_20191104_CB_20191104-su-CB-impeachment-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") At the end of the day, my Senate colleagues and I will serve as jurors, weighing the evidence for and against the president.**Trump may have betrayed his oath of office, but we will honor ours.** We have to do everything we can to protect the integrity of this impeachment inquiry. If we don't, then I fear this process will fall short and rip our country even further apart -- leaving us more divided than we already are. [**If you share my belief that this process should continue without obstruction from the president 's allies in Congress, add your name here.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/start-impeachment-proceedings?source=em_su_20191104_CB_20191104-su-CB-impeachment-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I believe that we must emerge from this sobering moment in our history as a stronger, more united country. Sincerely,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/start-impeachment-proceedings?source=em_su_20191104_CB_20191104-su-CB-impeachment-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac9/5fca0d19/765ae105/291c1f45/807995211/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac9/5fca0d19/765ae105/291c1f44/807995211/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac9/5fca0d19/765ae105/291c1f43/807995211/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac9/5fca0d19/765ae105/291c1f42/807995211/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac9/5fca0d19/765ae105/291c1f41/807995211/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ac9/5fca0d19/765ae105/291c1f45/807995211/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: More Attacks
disclaimer_text: paid for by outside groups
body:
Peter,

I need to ask for your help. At home, in the district, I remain under attack by conservative groups from outside Central Virginia who continue to spend hundreds of thousands of dollars attacking my legislative record on TV and online, and we're putting together our response plan. [**Can I ask you to make a contribution today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kRv7rWQPdGczEJoG0c1QrXP7EDCM9NEBNFChkZouVZQ=/Ftc8up36d0eosXYqIg38K6FzO_zerFZR5dDgJMhzsMw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20191104-2-EM&amount=50&amounts=50,100,200,500,1000,2800) | | | [ DONATE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/kRv7rWQPdGczEJoG0c1QrXP7EDCM9NEBNFChkZouVZQ=/Ftc8up36d0eosXYqIg38K6FzO_zerFZR5dDgJMhzsMw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20191104-2-EM&amount=50&amounts=50,100,200,500,1000,2800)
---
These outside groups want to distract from the work I'm doing for Central Virginians, and they're meant to create a hyper-partisan atmosphere with the hopes of scaring people.

I'm under attack with ads like these running throughout my district, paid for by outside groups.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/kRv7rWQPdGczEJoG0c1QrXP7EDCM9NEBNFChkZouVZQ=/Ftc8up36d0eosXYqIg38K6FzO_zerFZR5dDgJMhzsMw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20191104-2-EM&amount=50&amounts=50,100,200,500,1000,2800)
[**But these attacks won 't work. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/kRv7rWQPdGczEJoG0c1QrXP7EDCM9NEBNFChkZouVZQ=/Ftc8up36d0eosXYqIg38K6FzO_zerFZR5dDgJMhzsMw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20191104-2-EM&amount=50&amounts=50,100,200,500,1000,2800)

We're building a grassroots campaign. We're listening to the needs of Central Virginia families. And we're focused on the priorities of this district: lowering healthcare costs, expanding broadband coverage, and helping people afford their medications.

We're just under a year from my election, and national Republicans have already shown that they're willing to throw hundreds of thousands of dollars at our race. [**Can you make a contribution to my campaign today to help us fight back?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kRv7rWQPdGczEJoG0c1QrXP7EDCM9NEBNFChkZouVZQ=/Ftc8up36d0eosXYqIg38K6FzO_zerFZR5dDgJMhzsMw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20191104-2-EM&amount=50&amounts=50,100,200,500,1000,2800)
| | [ DONATE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/kRv7rWQPdGczEJoG0c1QrXP7EDCM9NEBNFChkZouVZQ=/Ftc8up36d0eosXYqIg38K6FzO_zerFZR5dDgJMhzsMw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20191104-2-EM&amount=50&amounts=50,100,200,500,1000,2800)
---
Thank you,

_-Abigail_

name: =?utf-8?Q?David?=
subject: Re: your plans with President Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
body:
| |
---
| | [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=761f627691&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| |
#
**President Trump wanted me to make sure you’d seen his email.**

A lot of people have entered this contest to meet the President for lunch and a photo in Atlanta on Friday, November 8th, but your name isn’t on the list. The President is concerned. He really wants you to be there as his VIP guest.

[**All you have to do is contribute ANY AMOUNT by 11:59 PM TONIGHT.** ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=9b750f265c&e=02cd889ad3)This is a huge opportunity to meet President Trump. He doesn’t want you to miss out, and neither do I.

[**Just contribute ANY AMOUNT by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to be entered to win. **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=81978dc18e&e=02cd889ad3)I’ll make sure President Trump is updated as soon as you enter this important contest.

Thank you.

David Perdue

\---------- Original message ----------
From: **Donald J. Trump** <[info@perdue2020.com](mailto:bonnie@perduesenate.com)>
Date: Sunday, November 3rd, 2019
Subject: Let's make plans together

Peter, In the midst of this Impeachment Hoax, there’s nobody I’d rather spend time with than my most loyal supporters. I don’t want to spend another second with the SWAMP, I want to be amongst the PEOPLE. That’s why I have an exciting announcement for ONLY my TOP supporters, and I can’t wait to share it with you. I’ve scheduled an important event in Atlanta on November 8th where I’ll be meeting with great American Patriots, and [**I want YOU to be there with me as my VIP guest. **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a6026f2b67&e=02cd889ad3) My good friend, who’s a true warrior, Senator David Perdue, will also be there to meet and talk with the great people of Georgia. All you have to do is contribute ANY AMOUNT by November 4th, and you’ll automatically be entered to win a meal with me. This offer is exclusive to my most LOYAL defenders, like YOU, so DON’T share this with anyone else. [**Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to be automatically entered to win a trip to meet me in Atlanta on November 8th.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e43aa79e03&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| [DONATE NOW >>>](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=d249ec5ceb&e=02cd889ad3 "DONATE NOW >>>")
---
| This will be the trip of a lifetime, Peter. If you win, the team will cover your flight, hotel, and meal, AND you’ll get to bring a guest of your choice. I am so grateful for the support and hard work of so many people around our district.
It all comes down to tomorrow--and it is ALL about who turns out!!

name: Evelyn Yang
subject: What I saw in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2618%2E377263%2ELJVPkC) Hi! This is Evelyn, Andrew’s wife.

I just finished my first weekend on the campaign trail with Andrew and wanted to share some thoughts with you. I did a CNN interview, a rally, a march, and an Iowa Democratic dinner and gala. Hundreds of supporters sang me “Happy Birthday,” which was very touching.

Experiencing what Andrew does on the trail was a lot to take in. But it was exhilarating. I felt first hand what keeps him going -- you all, his supporters. Your energy, your passion, your belief. On the rally stage, I said that I love the Yang Gang and I meant it from the bottom of my heart. The other thing that moved me on the trail was all the gratitude I received. Countless people thanked me for lending Andrew to this campaign and acknowledged the sacrifice of our family’s time missed with Dad.

People also told me about their own children and family members with autism and thanked me for sharing our family’s experience. They told me how meaningful it was to have us out there speaking for them and special needs.

This moved me a great deal in particular because as someone who never cared for the spotlight, I’ve had my reservations about having our family front and center.

As a mother, I’m very protective of my children. I admit I am still balancing wanting to shield them from the world and my desire to use our platform to help create a more inclusive society for them.

But this weekend on the trail showed me how important this campaign is to so many people. We truly do need to rewrite the rules to work for families across the country.

I’ve known that from the beginning, but I see it even more clearly now. It has me excited to get out on the trail again soon to continue spreading this vision we share.

[If you’re as excited for this vision as I am, can I ask you to please make your first contribution of $5 or more now? Andrew’s counting on all of us to build this future together. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15962?t=5&akid=2618%2E377263%2ELJVPkC)

Yours,

Evelyn Yang |

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=2618%2E377263%2ELJVPkC) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2618%2E377263%2ELJVPkC) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2019 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY
[Privacy Policy](https://www.yang2020.com/privacy-policy?t=4&akid=2618%2E377263%2ELJVPkC)

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: thanks for stepping up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Thank you so much for stepping up and helping us reach our October fundraising goal! We are now officially within one year of Election Day 2020, and I’m so grateful to have the support of one of the best grassroots communities in the country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11535549/117546412/480453248?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjdmNWQ0Mi00MWZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S2K3Yrdc__TSLCkSASekBc51Ufm0FydppKrxzIm5kAc=&refcode=em_ty_2019.11.04_b1_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,500,1000,2800) Team,

**Thank you so much for stepping up and helping us reach our October fundraising goal!** We are now officially within one year of Election Day 2020, and I’m so grateful to have the support of one of the best grassroots communities in the country.

If we keep up this pace, **I have no doubt that we can flip PA-10 blue and head to Washington to shake things up.** While a year might seem like a long way off, I promise you that next November will be here before we know it. The momentum we’ve built is strong, and I have faith that your continued support will push us to win this race.

Thanks again for standing with us,
Eugene | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11535550/117546413/480453248?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjdmNWQ0Mi00MWZmLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S2K3Yrdc__TSLCkSASekBc51Ufm0FydppKrxzIm5kAc=&refcode=em_ty_2019.11.04_b1_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,500,1000,2800)**

subject: Pledge to vote in your 2019 elections!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, We're just about a year out from the 2020 election that will determine the future of the presidency, but many states and local communities will be voting this month on a range of positions that are just as important. Local and state governments have immense power over our everyday lives, from changing zoning and affordable housing laws to funding schools and road repairs. These elections are so often ignored and receive low voter turnout because they don't have flashy candidates and national press coverage. But these new state governments will be the ones to determine redistricting in 2020 and will impact more than a decade of state and national politics through that redistricting. [**Please sign this pledge and promise to vote in your November 2019 elections. We need as many Democrats as possible to turn out and vote now so that our local and state governments reflect our progressive values.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc61/6e9863e8/160e9f74/1db081c9/2524368646/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/pledgetovote/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you! name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Are Democrat Leaders Even Paying Attention?
body:
"Politicians deal in exaggeration and deception, but sometimes you have to wonder if they even read the words that someone puts out in their name." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=97378d48e5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Are Democrat Leaders Even Paying Attention?**

“Politicians deal in exaggeration and deception, but sometimes you have to wonder if they even read the words that someone puts out in their name,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.

“Witness House Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s statement Friday on the surprisingly good monthly employment jobs report: ‘The October jobs report offers further evidence that the Republicans’ disastrous special interest agenda is hollowing out the middle class while enriching the wealthy and well-connected.’”

Seriously? “What hipster doofus wrote that?” the editors ask. “Hundreds of thousands of workers are returning to the workforce, wage gains are healthy, and those gains continue to spread to non-rich corners of the labor force.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8c99900336&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| MUST READ: Twenty years ago, Reps. Jim Sensenbrenner (R-WI) & Steve Chabot (R-OH) were on the House prosecution team for the impeachment case against former President Bill Clinton. Unlike today’s sham “investigation,” they gave the former President every due-process right to defend himself, they write in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6df6fbffd5&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “You’ll remember back in 2016 when the last president asked what ‘magic wand’ we had to bring manufacturing jobs back to our shores. We didn’t need a magic wand; we just needed Trump in the White House,” Vice President Mike Pence writes in the [_Richmond Times-Dispatch_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8a0d8da0a0&e=3ee4985eea). The Obama Administration saw America lose 200,000 manufacturing jobs. Since President Trump’s election, we’ve seen more than half a million created.
---
|
---
| Senior Advisor to the President Jared Kushner has received “special recognition from a national police group for his efforts on criminal justice reform, immigration, and ‘national service,’ especially to law enforcement,” Paul Bedard reports for the [_**Washington Examiner**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e7d80bc640&e=3ee4985eea). The Federal Law Enforcement Foundation awarded Kushner the “National Service Award” for his efforts in the passage of the bipartisan First Step Act.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5763f1501d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=211c8661d3&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=0ecf7f44e7)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: If you can, please chip in to help hit this goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We're fighting for big, structural change because that's what it takes to make a real difference in people's lives. That's why, on Friday, I laid out my plan to pay for Medicare for All. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528e9c/45c30650/106ba5b96/66f51542/437191181/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We're fighting for big, structural change because that's what it takes to make a real difference in people's lives.

That's why, on Friday, I laid out my plan to pay for Medicare for All. It doesn't raise taxes on the middle class, and it _does_ put $11 trillion in the pockets of American families.

It's part of how we'll make our government and our economy work for everyone, not just a thinner and thinner slice at the top. We call out what's broken, we make a plan to fix it, and we fight to get it done.

But we can only make the bold change we need if we build the biggest possible grassroots movement. **So our campaign set a big goal to raise $1 million by end of the week, one week after releasing one of our biggest plans yet -- to show that we're ready for big ideas, and to help make them happen.**

**[If you can, please pitch in for the first time today to help hit this goal. Every donation makes a difference and makes our movement stronger.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528e9c/45c30650/106ba5b96/66f51544/437191181/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDA4Rl9FR1JfR09MX0VfMjAxOTExMDRfVjFTMV9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML08F_EGR_GOL_E_20191104_V1S1_P_T1")**

But billionaires, CEOs, and giant corporations won't give up without a fight.

We need to link arms and use our power in our democracy to make big, structural change.

That's why, on Friday, I laid out my plan to pay for Medicare for All. | | | "" We're fighting for big, structural change because that's what it takes to make a real difference in people's lives. That's why, on Friday, I laid out my plan to pay for Medicare for All. It doesn't raise taxes on the middle class, and it does put $11 trillion in the pockets of American families. It's part of how we'll make our government and our economy work for everyone, not just a thinner and thinner slice at the top. We call out what's broken, we make a plan to fix it, and we fight to get it done. But we can only make the bold change we need if we build the biggest possible grassroots movement. So our campaign set a big goal to raise $1 million by end of the week, one week after releasing one of our biggest plans yet -- to show that we're ready for big ideas, and to help make them happen. body:

While it sounds far off, Election Day 2020 will be here before we know it and it's absolutely critical our campaign has the resources we need now for the grueling road ahead. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_s=365a6e8a871f46a3aa1025aab54b4363&_t=dwK-EEXWuIdmxtaVit67yzZAAmsqHERM8nSDyiZtALY8ewXFaVxTbkeuyv9z0R1n-POn2yh4-5Ye1PVGTAJopPH9Vousxkt_dCuV_d3PBhWxDQrsSQocveLTv7oUl5ErM9bqTkNGRGJCdWhMimUGILt2vWr0PgyftjegTSZdvoQ%3D)

---
Friend,

**We're officially T-1 year out from Election Day** , when voters will head to the polls and make a critical decision on the future of our country.

While it sounds far off, Election Day 2020 will be here before we know it and it's absolutely critical our campaign has the resources we need now for the grueling road ahead.

If you want a U.S. Senator who will fight for our Constitutional rights, border security, the Second Amendment, and defend President Trump against the _Democrats' impeachment sham_ - then we need to hear from you today. **[Will you consider chipping in $25, $50, $100, or even more as we buckle down for the critical year ahead of us.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=365a6e8a871f46a3aa1025aab54b4363&_e=xl0_4zNrISmA7Q4-bMRUsmhYBgpM_jVE0_MdQE7ygnNRqabV5FjTSjSKcY6SItmlx_Fj5uBiM8x6KIUcQmMHQqIePFw2_swhRuLYjbRpogskH2530E0wgtmWMvEnYzu7bXuefgjvNYzJX7zw30_dy6DG40sFPCRzcHFCNpKcRKWbx60zOK8HN5xY1p3soHjGVd5uDzs3EdFddzGLwPFk2Aw5zfcPhza1ZAl3wemz3H5RTeXwFgo1fwkuPyqTKLaAStF3Qjty6B9H5tIuNVrPFh_ag7-8E2NYCzUc6czey7pBItSSBAV9VI6pipZk6dBB24FLKpvjBPeaquVGiCqRDxMw9HumoeKzjyvMlb4OorZCZUeodsjahZbwGcsjwpYV)**

| [ **Lead Senator Daines to Victory »**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=365a6e8a871f46a3aa1025aab54b4363&_e=xl0_4zNrISmA7Q4-bMRUsmhYBgpM_jVE0_MdQE7ygnNRqabV5FjTSjSKcY6SItmlx_Fj5uBiM8x6KIUcQmMHQqIePFw2_swhRuLYjbRpogskH2530E0wgtmWMvEnYzu7bXuefgjvNYzJX7zw30_dy6DG40sFPCRzcHFCNpKcRKVsAgumC0_Os2qY3sQfWk55NfgZ5ZvGX7x6-btdGc8L8BnufqLJUwnMXupkBxCqrqwiZLV6IMVgATv0wrSnxzzHjMAfsF7TvZXumD6O93oJZS0w6KepoivP1m5XULavhaOAnCF9ID9Wg1TufRONsehwCPkmGVDgHoNHVBFYWeZpKi_EkmY2OVEi5mbRQiNGLkSPToT8lBqaZ6Cii2A9_Z7B)
---

The next year won't be easy. Democrats know they only have to _flip four U.S. Senate seats_ in order to win back the majority - and it's the Montana U.S. Senate seat that delivers it to them.

While it sounds like wishful thinking, their confidence and recent surge of momentum leads them to believe they can win in Republican strongholds - like Montana.

They will be investing tens of millions of dollars to defeat me, and we've got to be prepared for everything that comes our way over the next year.

**[So will you stand with us today and help us win our race?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=365a6e8a871f46a3aa1025aab54b4363&_e=xl0_4zNrISmA7Q4-bMRUsmhYBgpM_jVE0_MdQE7ygnNRqabV5FjTSjSKcY6SItmlx_Fj5uBiM8x6KIUcQmMHQqIePFw2_swhRuLYjbRpogskH2530E0wgtmWMvEnYzu7bXuefgjvNYzJX7zw30_dy6DG40sFPCRzcHFCNpKcRKVK9q5G1C7r62udaFtYMnXoob-r16sLs1KxBflOoM8HuRd_ZU5HSYlIHeXE1K23dUn-YAZyGpJFiAH2R7rB8XZwU-jvavvxZOOumftUh9D0yiKgorGanAY8XeH6_5kt-moiBLN89SnGZuX3mdY6qw7uZrw8K2FIFOCyx4by3obm4BtHcsZeVpeQCjT-CCVtFE2fEbRLcAwGa2s6gO0uhHNg)**

Thanks,

Senator Steve Daines

[ **Lead Senator Daines to Victory »**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=365a6e8a871f46a3aa1025aab54b4363&_e=xl0_4zNrISmA7Q4-bMRUsmhYBgpM_jVE0_MdQE7ygnNRqabV5FjTSjSKcY6SItmlx_Fj5uBiM8x6KIUcQmMHQqIePFw2_swhRuLYjbRpogskH2530E0wgtmWMvEnYzu7bXuefgjvNYzJX7zw30_dy6DG40sFPCRzcHFCNpKcRKUw-xBYeFqI8Z4urSCea6rQSvQhD0j-DiWNlhHuP9AFlRGgWT0lvpAfyHSbx0mird_3E8J5JMecMmbCfDTrGzVAM8n8tn3REJJArPAnWfC9_vQ-UOtb2os4YjgyPliq--SzgsNGVPxMEJIqiAK2AkBk_EyUX5M8_7r5sC3EGEuifrdzAEQNBFVz8JquZJOw7mBbSvYUYWxJ2jp_VmWSCauB)
---

_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.[Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=365a6e8a871f46a3aa1025aab54b4363&_e=xl0_4zNrISmA7Q4-bMRUsmhYBgpM_jVE0_MdQE7ygnNRqabV5FjTSjSKcY6SItmlx_Fj5uBiM8x6KIUcQmMHQqrqD49cbHNQMJoGGqPP0nVnIZevX6KucKXJ-RlZ8KyWerj1vLr3-u_uHdeDqet5pxiYZBvKXkJHGcoYoriexbXRls-bKPbvseJiEDdCylN1z7ZUsSFmBTa4O6rhcgfe8IciFqBQtD1rENMQP4qhUNtm_gP1Dc5ER8Noaeo0yFw--tANy8UqYSZHyOceaqg5eGReGbmoL_erc170azUvFHloXtsIp7iRMZPulffAen3xdTbOAwGhpJvH0uSyvQvRsik3eJQD2fcY-KrIa6J61rQX6kAc6tPZbnh62PZ-aLNf)

name: Amy Mesner, SaraGideon.com
subject: We are on the verge of a major milestone.
body:
100,000 online contributions.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ce5/4bef7a87/6b07dbaa/287fc07f/1435355777/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
We are on the verge of a major milestone:
**100,000 online contributions to our people-powered campaign.**
This is so important because it shows the strength and grassroots power of our movement. And because we aren't taking any money from corporate PACs, we depend on small-dollar contributions to keep our campaign moving forward!
[**So please, chip in any amount to help us hit our goal of reaching 100,000 online contributions.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ce5/4bef7a87/6b07dbaa/287fc07e/1435355777/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMDQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november?refcode=em191104-full")
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ce5/4bef7a87/6b07dbaa/287fc07e/1435355777/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMDQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november?refcode=em191104-full")
This is our chance to send a powerful message to Susan Collins, Mitch McConnell and all the national Republican donors watching our race.
Let's show them what a grassroots team like ours is capable of.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ce5/4bef7a87/6b07dbaa/287fc07e/1435355777/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMDQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november?refcode=em191104-full")******

Sara Gideon for Maine

In one year, Americans will cast their ballots in what will be **_the most consequential election of our lifetime._**

[A reminder of what's at stake:](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/2020-priorities-survey?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+A+reminder+of+whatrsquos+at+stake&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191104_Survey_90DO_D1&source=314_EM_FR_191104_Survey_90DO_D1")
1\. Control of Congress
2\. The Presidency
3\. And the very future of our planet!
---
It is crucial we know the issues that matter most to our supporters. Which issues are you most passionate about, and which issues keep you up at night.

_[We need at least [353] people in your area to reply before our midnight deadline, will you please submit your entry immediately?](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/2020-priorities-survey?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+We+need+at+least+353+people+in+ZIPyour+a&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191104_Survey_90DO_D1&source=314_EM_FR_191104_Survey_90DO_D1")_

name: Brian Mast
subject: A fellow Floridian is under attack!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
I am writing to you today with some urgent news. My friend, Congressman Matt Gaetz (FL-01), is under attack. As Matt continues to speak out for President Trump, the far-left is trying to silence him!
---
| | | [>>Donate Now<<](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Cwd2w3Gy73AXQJls10lh4o24cJCjqgxcXmk0-6B0PojAT_oH1-nUGx5st-ItFyFEbkbCnUYZpcVtHkfBF0EU6XP9rBBcEBkwbOh5JjY1azoKJ5fUXNc1sst2vLTiCD27cQCxkA5ZwGpwkF19sYGZO4FiD2BIzdGt5jaPDLzR1xT30_fHpewxrgpJXLhzcEdY&c=svLKhRNcXFkjzYv1QmoDzUjuYs6I_eRHIDqnExkH-mGaOG9A1-VF2w==&ch=gFYFLsiCPRZDiwXfscLU5kism-q9EMoKM1Yt4G3fbBMARM9nowvtJQ==)
---
| Matt and I both agree that socialism is NOT the answer to America's problems. We are both fighting day-in and day-out to ensure that the radical, big-government policies being promoted by the Democrats never take shape. The United States was based on the idea that if you work hard and pull yourself up, anything is possible. It is NOT the government's responsibility to provide better benefits to illegal immigrants than to our nation's veterans.

Their political machine knows that Matt is a threat to their plan to turn America into a socialist country, so they are doing everything in their power to discredit him.
That's why Matt needs your support today... name: Mary Ellen Smith, Team Hick
subject: Trump just raised $100,000 for Cory Gardner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Donald Trump spent last week raising money for senators who he needs to support him on impeachment. According to Politico, Cory Gardner alone has received over $100,000 from Trump's scheme. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146d/691c9bd/6ffd1a39/11a78700/1744096723/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, they're not even trying to hide the corruption at this point.

Donald Trump spent last week raising money for senators who he needs to support him on impeachment. **According to POLITICO, Cory Gardner alone has received over $100,000 from Trump 's scheme.

This isn't some secret, backroom deal. They're doing this out in the open.** [**_If that outrages you, chip in right now to build the campaign that will defeat them._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191104_MES_20191104-fr-MES-corruption-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

We already knew that Trump, McConnell and special interests would circle the wagons to protect their Senate majority--Trump is holding a "Save the Senate" fundraiser for Gardner this week, and McConnell is activating a network of wealthy donors to rush cash to the most vulnerable Republican senators.

Whether these efforts to pressure Cory Gardner to have Trump's back during the impeachment crisis pay off remains to be seen. But we know that the president is counting on "Quid Pro Cory" to fall in line.

**We don 't have to match their dirty money dollar for dollar, but we do need to show them they can't get away with it--**[**_chip in today and build the campaign that will fight this blatant corruption head on._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191104_MES_20191104-fr-MES-corruption-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
M.E.

Mary Ellen Smith
Campaign Manager
Hickenlooper for Colorado [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191104_MES_20191104-fr-MES-corruption-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146d/691c9bd/6ffd1a39/11a7873d/1744096723/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146d/691c9bd/6ffd1a39/11a7873a/1744096723/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146d/691c9bd/6ffd1a39/11a7873b/1744096723/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146d/691c9bd/6ffd1a39/11a78738/1744096723/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377146d/691c9bd/6ffd1a39/11a78739/1744096723/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Tomorrow's the big day. Don't leave it to chance.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
It's been an amazing journey since I first announced my candidacy for Kentucky governor. I'm proud to be running a campaign that's committed to improving our public schools, bringing more job opportun
|
---

| | Peter,

Well, tomorrow's the big day.

It's been an amazing journey since I first announced my candidacy for Kentucky governor. I'm proud to be running a campaign that's committed to improving our public schools, bringing more job opportunities to the hardworking people of Kentucky, and restoring honesty and integrity to Frankfort.

But the campaign isn't _quite_ over yet. **A day before the election, this race is a dead heat. It 's all going to come down to which side does a better job of turning out its supporters. So I need to make one more appeal to you, to please rush a donation so our team on the ground can get our voters to the polls tomorrow.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/5255798d/ad6dc73/17b707ad/db700d4/258141117/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-tom?express_lane=true&refcode=20191104.1nd__439__&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/5255798d/ad6dc73/17b707ad/db700d5/258141117/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-tom?express_lane=true&refcode=20191104.1nd__439__&amount=10")** **[DONATE $25](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/5255798d/ad6dc73/17b707ad/db700ea/258141117/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-tom?express_lane=true&refcode=20191104.1nd__439__&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/5255798d/ad6dc73/17b707ad/db700eb/258141117/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-tom?express_lane=true&refcode=20191104.1nd__439__&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/5255798d/ad6dc73/17b707ad/db700e8/258141117/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-tom?express_lane=true&refcode=20191104.1nd__439__&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/5255798d/ad6dc73/17b707ad/db700e9/258141117/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-tom?refcode=20191104.1nd__439__")** We've surprised a lot of folks by being in such a strong position with just a day left. We're poised to finally shape Kentucky into the place we all know it can be. And it's all because of _you_. _**You 're**_**the reason we 've come this far and I can't thank you enough.**

**[Now, all I ask is that you please pitch in right now -- any amount -- to help our hardworking team mobilize voters all across Kentucky tomorrow.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/5255798d/ad6dc73/17b707ad/db700ee/258141117/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-tom?refcode=20191104.1nd__439__&amount=5") We've worked too hard and come too far to leave anything up to chance. **

Thanks again, for everything. Let's go win this for Kentucky!

\-- Andy | | **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/5255798d/ad6dc73/17b707ad/db700ee/258141117/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-tom?refcode=20191104.1nd__439__&amount=5")**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump thinks calling witnesses is "another Democrat Hoax"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Trump was up early today firing off tweet after tweet justifying his actions and trying to delegitimize the inquiry. He questioned whether the whistleblower was real and continued calling the entire process a "Witch Hunt." He even claimed (without evidence) that he has a 95% approval ratings among Republicans \-- ignoring the fact that 55% of Americans disapprove of him. While it seems far off, Election Day 2020 is just one year away, and we need to know exactly where the electorate stands on Trump so we can tailor our strategy to get him out of office: **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc63/6e9863e8/16087272/1db08382/3038179857/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ErQtXSaL") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc63/6e9863e8/16087272/1db08382/3038179857/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ErQtXSaL") Thank you so much for your participation. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc63/6e9863e8/16087272/1db08381/3038179857/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191104b.ND-b&refcode2=ynP6F6AgrlwnRPpyEcUP")

body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I need your immediate attention. Take a look at how close I am to qualifying for this month's debate. [_**It would be gut-wrenching to come so close, only to miss out at the last second. That 's why I'm asking for your urgent $5 in these final days to make it. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191104_em_fr_b2_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191104_em_fr_b2_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
---

For everyone who feels like their voice has been discounted and cast aside.

For every child wondering why no president has ever looked like them.

For every parent struggling to lift their family out of poverty.

**I want you to know: I 've felt your struggle. I've been in your shoes. And I'm going to fight for us on that debate stage.**

Will you rush $5 to help me qualify?

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Thank you,

Julian

| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc87e/3eb3e2fc/56711f21/744d8e49/1145688073/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc87e/3eb3e2fc/56711f21/744d8e48/1145688073/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc87e/3eb3e2fc/56711f21/744d8eb7/1145688073/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

body:
At 8p ET tonight get all your votes in! | |

|
## Dancing with the Stars is back tonight!
---
|
---
Filming this week on the USS Iowa for tonight’s episode of Dancing with the Stars.
| | I can't believe it, but we're back tonight for the 8th week of Dancing with the Stars. If we advance again tonight, we’ll be dancing next week in the quarter-finals.

I'm dancing first in the show tonight doing a jazz number. Then tonight after all of the individual dances there are dance-offs, where we’ll go up against another one of the couples on the dance floor in front of the judges. The judges will then decide who wins the dance off and the winners get 2 points added to their overall score.

We've been working hard on both dances this week so that our scores continue to improve, but we will be counting on your votes to advance another week. So set your reminders, tell all your friends, tweet and then vote tonight during the show!
---
|
---
| | **_How to vote:_**

You can submit 20 votes total for Sean and Lindsay. Please make sure to cast all 20.

You can submit 10 votes by texting SEAN to 21523. Each text is one vote, you have to send SEAN 10 times to submit all 10 votes.

You can submit 10 additional votes online at [ABC.com](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=22ea84825c&e=f6564bbe3b). You need to start by making an account [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=221adbd54a&e=f6564bbe3b) (which you can do now before voting opens).

When voting begins you login and can add 10 votes for Sean and Lindsay, #TeamSweetandSpicey.

Only votes cast during the live show so consider setting a calendar reminder for 8pm ET. For those in Mountain or Pacific time zones you can still vote but it has to happen while the show is live on the east coast (6-8pm CT and 5-7pm PT).

All the information on making an ABC account and other FAQs are [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9494d85e59&e=f6564bbe3b).
---
| Thanks,

_Sean_
---
|
---
|
---
|
---

name: unacceptable@nikkifosteroh.com
subject: "A partisan witch hunt"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
---
| | Steve Chabot is again proving that he'll choose undying partisan loyalty to Donald Trump over accountability and the Constitution. Democrats voting to begin the impeachment inquiry are bravely standing up against the President's abuse of power and working to put a stop to it. Steve Chabot could learn a thing or two from them -- but he only stands on principle when it's against Democrats. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - **Republican Representative Steve Chabot is blasting the impeachment inquiry as a "witch hunt":** [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_nov?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191104_ChabotImpeachment_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191104_ChabotImpeachment_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191104_ChabotImpeachment_U1_X1") He's betraying his oath of office and his responsibility to his country. "As a fiscal and economic conservative with a plan for tackling the climate crisis, Weld is campaigning to secure the Republican nomination against Trump."

Governor Weld joined the Forbes Under 30 Summit. Watch his appearance at the link below"

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6NS2bKpYnMmDAAaH_sla5-FgzwRcbPAMj9ZPDkXXY3Enmg82f5m4OT6fXSy7qX9g1sxMkUoYQ1wECNOXtzc-pg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191104_newsletter&n=6)

Governor Weld joined the Words Matter podcast live from Politicon. Listen to the episode at the link below.

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=luGjWyIDaZIhD43EBm601avKGx2DxHPdlRdIIgNPvWoSPdcS5IclJ18fsqJvTn04I7s5HCXt6oFOb5aSIbgj7D3DjJYh7759fGm8cnsiWQmkFbHtL4n87f1pcrkjSIY5&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191104_newsletter&n=7)

Other folks support Mondaire because they know he's a champion of working-class families. Having grown up in just such a family, being raised by a single mother, this fight is personal for Mondaire. We've also heard that some people love the fact that Mondaire has been fighting for what's right since he was a high school student; Mondaire got his start in politics standing up for students in the East Ramapo Central School District. And other supporters are proud to stand with a candidate who has won the support of key progressive allies like Victory Fund and The Collective PAC. name: =?utf-8?Q?Donald=20J.=20Trump?=
subject: Don't share this with anyone else
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
body:
What are you doing on November 8th? | |
---
| |
#
Peter, In the midst of this Impeachment Hoax, there’s nobody I’d rather spend time with than my most loyal supporters. I don’t want to spend another second with the SWAMP, I want to be amongst the PEOPLE. That’s why I have an exciting announcement for ONLY my TOP supporters, and I can’t wait to share it with you. I’ve scheduled an important event in Atlanta on November 8th where I’ll be meeting with great American Patriots, and [**I want YOU to be there with me as my VIP guest. **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=15cc9117a8&e=02cd889ad3) My good friend, who’s a true warrior, Senator David Perdue, will also be there to meet and talk with the great people of Georgia. All you have to do is contribute ANY AMOUNT by November 4th, and you’ll automatically be entered to win a meal with me. This offer is exclusive to my most LOYAL defenders, like YOU, so DON’T share this with anyone else. [**Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to be automatically entered to win a trip to meet me in Atlanta on November 8th.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=254244b820&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| [DONATE NOW >>>](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=0def1e7004&e=02cd889ad3 "DONATE NOW >>>")
---
| This will be the trip of a lifetime, Peter. If you win, the team will cover your flight, hotel, and meal, AND you’ll get to bring a guest of your choice. We’ll even take a photo together so we can remember this day forever. [**Contribute ANY AMOUNT by the deadline on November 4th to win this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to meet your favorite President! **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=49d4d0bad9&e=02cd889ad3) Thank you,
[](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=b4d62c538b&e=02cd889ad3)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States
---
| [DONATE NOW >>>](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=3ec3c4681c&e=02cd889ad3 "DONATE NOW >>>")
---
|
---
|

---
| |
---
| **NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN.** Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Perdue for Senate by clicking [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c8d7cba728&e=02cd889ad3). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=dfc41b1ffe&e=02cd889ad3). Entries must be received between November 1, 2019, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on November 4, 2019 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winners will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations and tickets to attend the lunch (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e41138dc9d&e=02cd889ad3) for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Perdue for Senate, PO Box 12077, Atlanta, GA 30355.

---
| PO Box 12077, Atlanta, GA 30355
[Privacy Policy](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=d66b950ab5&e=02cd889ad3)

Want to change how you receive these emails? We would hate to see you go - these emails are critical to our campaign - but you can [update your preferences](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3&c=3e41a648df)

He's counting on your help to continue delivering results. These emails are critical to keeping you updated on ways you can help David make a difference. Thank you for all that you do!

subject: How do you measure a year? (Match extended!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We're one year (minus one day) out from the election, and our match has been extended until midnight because of the amazing support that's poured in!

|

Peter --

We're one year (minus one day) out from the election, and **our match has been extended until midnight because of the amazing support that 's poured in!**

Here's how we measure a year at MJ for Texas HQ:
* _28.7 million_ Texans to get out and talk to
* Nearly $11 million of Senator John Cornyn's campaign cash that we're up against
* 20 media markets to spread our message far and wide

One year may seem like a long time, but we've got **a lot** of work to do to build the campaign we need to win in a state as big as Texas. **[Will you pitch in now to help defeat Sen. Cornyn and send MJ to the Senate?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890872/7f51f7bc/4b366130/4ef34a53/2563793129/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yroutmatchextended?refcode=email_20191104nd__474__&amount=5&recurring=true")**
