For as long as I can remember, my life has centered around the basic belief that when level-headed people come together and treat each other with | | | [](http://links.bollierforkansas.com/u/click?_t=9b0f889d9ec84544b5cf693bbcca79a1&_m=37fa3a5717794c98b52a42b45abacb61&_e=wdKWD2dIu1btmK4AzvXFkBtL9hEn-_4Ce-HSmN9zGoUBPKk7PRtP--fXcdyPSSASc6f-4Z9wfW-OzFjfFrOU6k1s08sKzXA6UncTyaJErtO6nMO_8FV8Gcd6_1f4z_wkafe1KMwaqSwewWHoOgNbFg8J5yYIZjUyxEKODVlWIO-oKegNSfA_uQ7JXMwmIYpSox0W6ObVvnv09qKYSVXeLhZxH876XpSJjHs2xTryCJEEH0vyfObe6cilFWD_udOJC-FQagI9RLxlzwmmryWUPSJ0FBlLYJ1Ao1taOUohzya7XEtq1QdZoRgC0sPm0F5aFGCC7uVP47TXr_MBZff6m7CGY0WEU5T4Mvhp0m93hv5e_p-XAF4gPx-OQ8IYfKI2sOeItFuLWKsjkNKu02R3cet-2mFDnmGbesQlfAAhD9WJjSu4ICQmSzBlqXXNEryaHNFRSrsXfOZnGqTWeD7Setf7I8wTS3CDpHkDlfu5mnY%3D)
For as long as I can remember, my life has centered around the basic belief that when level-headed people come together and treat each other with respect, we can find commonsense solutions that improve people’s lives. It's clear that many have lost sight of that mission in Washington D.C. That’s why I’m running for the United States Senate in Kansas. We must do better for our families. But to win this historic race, I need your foundational support today. **[Donate $10 now to help me build a winning campaign and get the U.S. Senate back to work for the people of Kansas.](http://links.bollierforkansas.com/u/click?_t=9b0f889d9ec84544b5cf693bbcca79a1&_m=37fa3a5717794c98b52a42b45abacb61&_e=wdKWD2dIu1btmK4AzvXFkBtL9hEn-_4Ce-HSmN9zGoUBPKk7PRtP--fXcdyPSSASc6f-4Z9wfW-OzFjfFrOU6k1s08sKzXA6UncTyaJErtO6nMO_8FV8Gcd6_1f4z_wkafe1KMwaqSwewWHoOgNbFg8J5yYIZjUyxEKODVlWIO-oKegNSfA_uQ7JXMwmIYpSox0W6ObVvnv09qKYSVXeLhZxH876XpSJjHs2xTryCJEEH0vyfObe6cilFWD_udOJ_tzI11nioq6OrdwuL19huOUUXx2Pd9r082u6KAAMZksHYjFw1XQl6dQ4f3zsenGi8dI1EOIa6ehihvcxMBSr61TOilaflSZlJ4yCdju-Ug535MkBVM4rORuOc2rTeC6yjDpouPhhfQzPqPhCRsOKCpaKC6tcZKoIlUwCpXP-rEsKeIaZhual21Rxs2cBiYBTu1K-rKQDid0RflAJtrAShgi6oe3eQXt-8mvatng_vkyFSyehxo9ehqMjn-0rD3M8)** [](http://links.bollierforkansas.com/u/click?_t=9b0f889d9ec84544b5cf693bbcca79a1&_m=37fa3a5717794c98b52a42b45abacb61&_e=wdKWD2dIu1btmK4AzvXFkBtL9hEn-_4Ce-HSmN9zGoUBPKk7PRtP--fXcdyPSSASc6f-4Z9wfW-OzFjfFrOU6k1s08sKzXA6UncTyaJErtO6nMO_8FV8Gcd6_1f4z_wkafe1KMwaqSwewWHoOgNbFg8J5yYIZjUyxEKODVlWIO-oKegNSfA_uQ7JXMwmIYpSox0W6ObVvnv09qKYSVXeLhZxH876XpSJjHs2xTryCJEEH0vyfObe6cilFWD_udOJ_tzI11nioq6OrdwuL19huOUUXx2Pd9r082u6KAAMZks-T4k4g5TdtLE4lusRFaIH8bQe-t0k8d6PtTx4BqnOCSWIMoXOtZoxqlzX00aHXkSCTd43-utU-RI9hdPPAwbyPP9GH7HXuBwvno1uMBYn4v8A0CBGGEXSOfAxbBVx0n_JlxuUSW-4JiFdeVmVvezbDHheseYj1XGSY8T2bURDC8tSGG9480y0E04GDCfDLUnX4SV_qUNqbf08rr4iSPe4) Growing up in Kansas, both of my parents worked in healthcare. My mother was a nurse practitioner and my father was a doctor. He made it his mission to make healthcare more affordable for working families through innovation. Like my father, I became a doctor to help people. And I first got into public service because I witnessed firsthand just how broken our healthcare system was. The costs are far too high and access is too low. Families are drowning in medical costs while some can’t even get basic care. [CONTRIBUTE](http://links.bollierforkansas.com/u/click?_t=9b0f889d9ec84544b5cf693bbcca79a1&_m=37fa3a5717794c98b52a42b45abacb61&_e=wdKWD2dIu1btmK4AzvXFkBtL9hEn-_4Ce-HSmN9zGoUBPKk7PRtP--fXcdyPSSASc6f-4Z9wfW-OzFjfFrOU6k1s08sKzXA6UncTyaJErtO6nMO_8FV8Gcd6_1f4z_wkafe1KMwaqSwewWHoOgNbFg8J5yYIZjUyxEKODVlWIO-oKegNSfA_uQ7JXMwmIYpSox0W6ObVvnv09qKYSVXeLhZxH876XpSJjHs2xTryCJEEH0vyfObe6cilFWD_udOJC-FQagI9RLxlzwmmryWUPelLb29EY94VgLZA3yykxEQuY5fVYDG_HZ1T1U1E7u_Pe2riCl-gS6MvhU9BFdGle59kHC1z6BKCZwlRCiD4YzRWsqqV_u0OFTyRNpZyFWnGF2aqqox0ofSoataYUUD-Idfn4UfJLU6Hh29SdzfhsNv_SUxDwSob4vJaw02TOK_P1GL7hboprHF_MI8Euus79ZOqBlIQLsNGvGGwfF03Ijg%3D) So I ran, and won, a seat in the Kansas State House and then in the Kansas State Senate. There I was focused on expanding healthcare, funding our schools and growing the economy for Kansas families. I was always focused on solutions rather than partisan politics. **I am a doctor; that’s just how I see things.** I went into public service for the same reason I went into medicine: to help people. Plain and simple. But sadly, many politicians have lost sight of that mission. We’re at a crossroads in Kansas. We need a leader who will put our families first. We need a public servant focused on finding solutions for regular Kansans, not waging petty political fights. We need to send a commonsense leader to Washington. That’s what brings me here. I choose solutions. I choose the people. I will be the voice of reason Kansans deserve. **[Chip in now if you’re with me in this fight to win the Kansas Senate seat in 2020 and elect someone who will work for you!](http://links.bollierforkansas.com/u/click?_t=9b0f889d9ec84544b5cf693bbcca79a1&_m=37fa3a5717794c98b52a42b45abacb61&_e=wdKWD2dIu1btmK4AzvXFkBtL9hEn-_4Ce-HSmN9zGoUBPKk7PRtP--fXcdyPSSASc6f-4Z9wfW-OzFjfFrOU6k1s08sKzXA6UncTyaJErtO6nMO_8FV8Gcd6_1f4z_wkafe1KMwaqSwewWHoOgNbFg8J5yYIZjUyxEKODVlWIO-oKegNSfA_uQ7JXMwmIYpSox0W6ObVvnv09qKYSVXeLhZxH876XpSJjHs2xTryCJEEH0vyfObe6cilFWD_udOJC-FQagI9RLxlzwmmryWUPSrN4kV_-S9W12SrwkgxDzML-8y0j2j2OfybLalWClNV6kL-76oqC6If2YRikoy-Gu9NrWFkKt8VXwc-tbjpDcA4YU5rQpuZp2d_4Rf-tWFMnB2AkhRUK4yb_WDDXgseNhi79BAqEzMNpaq9w8H7YETQ0cMDMPc5eH28GmJn6oyLpLahfd6c13ZlRqFD8_xYlj3PoSvL_QJ9degnnp5N_Dk%3D)** name: Josh Mahony
subject: It's official: I'm the only Democrat in the race
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting
body:
I am the only person in this race who will fight for you.

| [](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191104filing&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| Friend,

Today, I officially filed to run for Senate in 2020 against Tom Cotton. [](https://secure.joshuamahony.com/page/m/4ea09d68/382d5bd5/735617c/3b075b6b/3630250271/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoibWFob255LW5vdiIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0xOTExMDRmaWxpbmcifQ%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191104filing&recurring=auto") **Now more than ever, it 's critical that I have your support so we can demonstrate we have what it takes to win. **

**[It's going to take all of us to beat Tom Cotton. If you're with me, pitch in $10 or more so we can rapidly grow our momentum, build our campaign around the state, and take this thing to Tom Cotton's doorstep.](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191104filing&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Express Donate $10](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em191104filing&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

[Express Donate $50](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em191104filing&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $100](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em191104filing&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em191104filing&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Donate Other Amount](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?refcode=em191104filing&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=") It's been hard to watch as he's allowed a trade war to decimate our family farms, voted to strip healthcare away from Arkansans with pre-existing conditions, hugged Trump and McConnel, and supported giving tax breaks to the wealthiest in America while leaving the rest of us to foot the bill.

**We have an opportunity to transform our state and get our country back on track.**

**[Let's put Tom Cotton -- and the entire country -- on notice. Chip in $10 or whatever you can now and help us hit our goal of 250 grassroots donations in November.](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191104filing&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Let's go,

Josh

name: Stephanie Schmid
subject: We need 39 of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
I just spent 39 hours knocking on doors. Can you pitch in to power this campaign?
|
---

| | Friends, I've spent 39 hours over the past few days going door to door to help elect local Democratic leaders across New Jersey. My opponent has been in office for 39 years gutting women's healthcare and LGBTQ+ rights. He's the last Republican in our Congressional delegation standing, and we can make sure he's retired by this time next year. [**Can 39 of you step up and donate $39 to my grassroots fund so I can keep fighting for all of us?**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff081/522d4087/7afd796e/4f3422c0/4180947749/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=20191104_em&amount=39&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=1+-+Can+39+of+you+step+up+and+donate+39+to+m&utm_campaign=20191104_em&source=20191104_em") | **[Donate $39](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff081/522d4087/7afd796e/4f3422ff/4180947749/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=20191104_em&amount=39&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=2+-+Donate+39&utm_campaign=20191104_em&source=20191104_em")**
---
I'm running for Congress to make sure we all have the representation we deserve and I know how to get things done because I've spent my entire life--39 years to be exact--serving my community and my country as a volunteer, an advocate, a U.S. Diplomat, and a human rights attorney.
I'm going to keep knocking on doors and keep fighting for what's right until the polls close tomorrow night. [**So please chip in $39 so I can keep knocking on doors to elect New Jersey Democrats.**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff081/522d4087/7afd796e/4f3422fe/4180947749/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=20191104_em&amount=39&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=3+-+So+please+chip+in+39+so+I+can+keep+knock&utm_campaign=20191104_em&source=20191104_em")
**[Donate $39](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff081/522d4087/7afd796e/4f3422fd/4180947749/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=20191104_em&amount=39&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=4+-+Donate+39&utm_campaign=20191104_em&source=20191104_em")**
---
See you out there,
Stephanie

|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Lindsey Graham calls impeachment "political death penalty"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- South Carolina Senator Lindsey Graham has had an amazing transformation from Trump critic to Trump sycophant, and nowhere is that more apparent than his ardent and toxic defense of Trump in the face of impeachment. He pushed a resolution in the Senate condemning the House's impeachment inquiry, called the House impeachment rules vote "Very sad and unnecessary," and now, he's comparing the entire process to the death penalty. And he hasn't stopped there \-- in the Senate, Graham has used his sway with Mitch McConnell to block progressive bills from the House that would help people. He has fought against campaign finance reform and the Affordable Care Act and even defended Trump's trade war with China as his own constituents face layoffs. Lindsey Graham's re-election campaign is flush with cash from large-money donors and corporate PACs as they prepare to not only defend his seat but also defend the GOP Senate majority that allows Graham and co-conspirator Mitch McConnell to hold the country hostage. But Jaime Harrison, Graham's Democratic opponent, is making major headway with two back-to-back record-breaking fundraising quarters. name: Marcy Kaptur for Congress
subject: Help us continue to build momentum on Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress P
body:
| | | Dear Friend,
Tuesday, November 5 is Election Day in many local jurisdictions. Election day provides us with an opportunity to exercise our rights and contribute to the ongoing American experiment of rule of, by, and for the people. If your community has a local election this Tuesday, please Vote! I don’t have to tell you that our basic freedoms are being challenged like never before. The United States Supreme Court has allowed unchecked partisan gerrymandering that allows politicians to draw their own districts, and dark money to flow into our campaigns by the millions. Our president strains the rule of law every day. But it is in the people, in you, that our founders vested power. One year ago Americans sent a message that a game rigged towards corporations doesn’t square with our values. One year ago Americans sent a message that a pre-existing condition shouldn’t be a barrier to health coverage. In the year that the Democratic Party has controlled the House of Representatives we’ve passed bill after bill to restore power and dignity to workers around the country. We’ve begun to hold the president accountable through diligent oversight. Local elections demand our attention. My staff and I are always looking for strong local partners to help bring resources into your community, and it is vital that we maintain momentum heading into next year’s presidential election.Taking back the House was just one step. In the coming year I’ll be working to turn Ohio blue again. President Obama won our state twice; with strong, progressive voices up and down the ballot we will be successful again. I thank you for exercising your fundamental right to vote. Our living democracy depends on it. Yours, Marcy Kaptur
---
